# Leadwa

WhatsApp lead-capture for small businesses in India and beyond.

## What it does

- Create free WhatsApp links and QR codes in seconds (no signup required)
- Track every click: see which ad, post, or QR code brought each lead
- Get follow-up alerts when a hot lead goes cold after 24 hours
- Never lose another lead in your WhatsApp scroll

## Key pages

- Free link generator: https://leadwa.co/
- Country-specific pages (India, UAE, Singapore, USA, UK, Australia): https://leadwa.co/whatsapp-link-generator/india
- Answers and guides: https://leadwa.co/answers
- Dashboard (for saved links): https://leadwa.co/dashboard

## Who it's for

Small businesses that use WhatsApp for customer enquiries:
- Coaching institutes and tutors
- Clinics, salons, and wellness centers
- Shops, cafes, and local services
- Agencies, freelancers, and consultants
- Anyone running ads on Instagram, Facebook, or Google and sending leads to WhatsApp

## Pricing summary

- **Free tier**: Link generator, QR code, mini page, click count (no signup)
- **Basic (₹199/month)**: Click tracking, source analytics, follow-up alerts, lead inbox
- **Pro (₹999/month)**: API automation, drip campaigns, team features, webhooks

No hidden fees. No WhatsApp Business API approval required. Works on your existing WhatsApp.

## Common questions answered

1. How to create a WhatsApp link for business: https://leadwa.co/answers/how-to-create-whatsapp-link-for-business
2. Pre-filled message links: https://leadwa.co/answers/whatsapp-link-with-prefilled-message
3. Tracking which ad brought a lead: https://leadwa.co/answers/how-to-know-which-ad-brought-whatsapp-lead
4. Why leads get lost on WhatsApp: https://leadwa.co/answers/why-am-i-losing-whatsapp-leads
5. QR codes for shop counters: https://leadwa.co/answers/whatsapp-qr-code-for-shop-counter
6. Follow-up without being spammy: https://leadwa.co/answers/how-to-follow-up-whatsapp-leads-without-being-spammy
7. Avoiding WhatsApp bans: https://leadwa.co/answers/how-to-stop-whatsapp-number-getting-banned

## Contact

- Website: https://leadwa.co
- Support: Available via the dashboard after signup
